instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 谁是论文《GraphText: Graph Reasoning in Text Space》的所有作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'GraphText: Graph Reasoning in Text Space'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name
